Sites that win work.Systems that get work done.

Small businesses thrive when they can focus on delivering value to clients.

See Services

Process

1

Discovery

Free initial consult, discuss requirements, finalize work order

2

Design

Discuss strategy and design, business process assessment, draft mockups and review

3

Build

Build, implement, test, review.
Meet regularly on larger projects

4

Go Live

Deploy, live testing, training, and turnover

Client Reviews

Scott did a great job updating my business website. He was very knowledable and explained all the options I should consider. He was very quick to act and had my website transformed at record pace. My business benefited immediately from his updates and I wish I would have done it earlier. I would highly recommend ScottG Solutions for any of his services.

Laura K. Google

I just needed a simple site where people could see my credentials, services, and book an onsite visit. We had it up in 2 weeks I highly recommend Scott to get you online.

Marco G. Google

I met with Scott to build a blog and portfolio as a dietician. I tried Wix in the past but it was too much for me. The planning and design was super helpful and he was very helpful and responsive. Now I have something to show patients and interviews. It is easy to grow my site now and I want to meet with Scott again soon for a shop idea!

Jing B. Google

Services

Simple Business Sites


Basic Site - Up to 3 pages, minimal customization, 2 design calls prior to build

Site integration with tools you already use (payment, newsletter signup, social feed, reviews, etc.)

$500 - $800

Custom Site & Business Suite Strategy

Custom website with multiple pages and a blog, 3 design calls prior to build plus branding & market research to drive design decisions

Content manager to let your team make edits to pages and articles without a developer

Business Suite Scan - find out what tools you are already paying for and how to use them

$1200 - $4000

Tech-Enabled Business Systems

Custom website with multiple pages and a blog, 3 design calls prior to build plus branding & market research to drive design decisions

Content manager to let your team make edits to pages and articles without a developer

Assessment and Strategic Planning - work shop business objectives, systems, and ways to streamline processes for your clients and team

Business System Implementation to include website, email, notification, lead onboarding, client pipelines, meeting scheduling, payment systems, AdSense, analytics, process automation and more according to our strategic planning sessions

$3500 - $7000

Service Plans Below

Service Plans

Simple Upkeep Plan

  • web hosting
  • site maintenance
  • monthly site updates (1-2x text/image content changes)
$80 / mo

Standard Support Plan

  • web hosting
  • site maintenance
  • monthly site updates (1-2x text/image and minor structural changes)
  • weekly backups
  • monthly site report
  • monthly strategy touchpoint
$200 / mo

Priority Business Plan

  • web hosting
  • site maintenance
  • monthly site updates (1-3x text/image and minor structural changes)
  • weekly backups
  • monthly enhanced site report
  • monthly strategy touchpoint
  • priority tech support
  • 20% off adhoc service hours
$350 / mo
